plan: 1. Get red key (kR) at [5,8]: from start [1,1], go east to [2,1], south to [2,3], east to [3,3], south to [3,9], east to [5,9], face north, PICKUP red key.
2. Open red door (DR) at [6,7]: move north through [5,8] to [5,7], face east, TOGGLE (consumes red key), MOVE_FORWARD through door.
3. Activate switch (s1) at [10,5]: go east across row 7 to [10,7], turn north to [10,5], TOGGLE (opens gate g1 at [11,4]).
4. Get blue key (kB) at [8,1]: go east to [11,5], turn north through open gate [11,4] to [11,3], west to [9,3], north to [9,1], face west, PICKUP blue key.
5. Open blue door (DB) at [11,1] and reach goal [12,1]: turn east, go to [10,1], TOGGLE (consumes blue key), MOVE_FORWARD to [11,1], MOVE_FORWARD to [12,1], DONE.
